membership_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องคีย์

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loanemer_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loanspec_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loannormal_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.collactelral_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.share_sequester, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.force_keeping, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.crem_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.represent_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.committee_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.official_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.agent_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.inspector_status, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coll_resign,
( SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor.debtor_desc FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor where sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor.debtor_desc = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code) as debtor_desc , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.adj_payroll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.att_loan_permit, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_divident, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_average, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code, ( SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_desc FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code where sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code) as mem_type_desc ,
sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.description from sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status where sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.shareloan_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code) as description , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_saving_member , ( SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.saving_name FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving where sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.other_saving_member = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_saving_member) as saving_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loanemer_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loanemer_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loanspec_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_loannormal_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.collactelral_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code <> '00' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.adj_payroll <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.att_loan_permit <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_divident <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.drop_average <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code <> '00' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code <> '00' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_saving_member <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.force_keeping <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.crem_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.represent_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.committee_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.official_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.agent_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.inspector_status <> '0' OR sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coll_resign <> '0' ) /*WHERE*/
